rows.raw: Demonstrate conditioned-kernel substrate gain over bare generation on a small local model under Jetson Orin Nano 8GB edge budgets. Evidence used: This system is fully local, sensors are out of scope for v0, the model is a replaceable linguistic transducer, the target device is jetson_orin_nano_8gb (one model at a time), one repair pass is allowed (max=1). Active profile: orin_nano_8gb. Current goal: Demonstrate conditioned-kernel substrate gain over bare generation.
